productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Cruiseon Charcoal Grey Shoe
description: Get ready to shift your training to the next level with these Cruiseon shoes from reebok. The sleek design will keep you looking cool on and off the tracks. Designed for comfort and superior performance, expect to train longer and better in these shoes.Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight breathability Padded collar and tongue for superior Fit and comfort Lace-ups for a snug fit Logo name on tongue and behind collar Logo design on the sides in the form of strategic panelling Midsole EVA midsole for cushioning and better shock absorption Outsole Scooped out arch area to reduce shock impact Flex grooves to increase natural flexibility of the foot TPR outsole in waffle pattern to increase durability and traction Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
